human_verification.notes: Verified funeral, cemetery, cremation, vital-record, benefit-support, records-governance, source-class, refusal, escalation, and scenario-to-ability coverage for issue #1368.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit refusal, escalation, and funeral/cemetery/end-of-life-specific evidence behavior.
Functionality mapping covers all shared abilities, all records-documentation-and-administration abilities, and the cross-industry artifact-awareness ability.

specialist_owned_evidence: The pack names funeral-specific artifacts including GPL, CPL, OBCPL, itemized statement, EDRS, disposition permits, cremation authorization, authorizing-agent evidence, custody-chain records, cemetery interment records, SSA-721, VA burial-benefit support, and retention/access artifacts.

Boundary handling is explicit for legal right of disposition, death certificate amendments, cremation or interment approval, cemetery authority, preneed financial decisions, benefits eligibility, privacy/access decisions, and official-record updates.
Retention, access, source conflict, identity, custody, and safety prerequisites are escalated instead of overresolved.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction-specific and tenant-specific questions are converted into required retrieval or escalation behavior.
Package is ready for validated spec-pack use and future retained-implementation promotion if repeated runtime demand justifies it.
